examples: Reduced-calorie cheese is a great substitute for cream cheese.
A glass or two of wine will not significantly add to the calorie count.
Nutritionists say only 33 percent of our calorie intake should be from fat.
When high-calorie, nutrition-poor foods like Pop-Tarts, Doritos and soda were expensive, the shoppers purchased far fewer calories overall.
Many companies have already started to introduce new low-calorie items and serve smaller helpings.
